subject: Question about charge for order #NV23456
body: Hi, I recently received my order #NV23456 for the X500 Wireless Headphones, but when I looked at my bank statement, I noticed I was charged $129.99, which is $10 more than the price listed on your website. The order was placed on February 10th and I received an email confirmation with the total of $119.99. Could you please look into this and let me know what happened? My order details are as follows: 1 X500 Wireless Headphones, color: black, and the payment method was PayPal.
gold_reply: Dear valued customer, thank you for reaching out to us about the discrepancy in the charge for your order #NV23456. We apologize for the confusion. After investigating, we found that there was an error in our system that added a $10 shipping surcharge to your order, which was not reflected in your initial order confirmation. The correct total for your order, including the shipping surcharge, is indeed $129.99. However, since this was not clearly communicated to you, we would like to refund the $10 shipping surcharge back to your PayPal account as a one-time courtesy. You should receive the refund within the next 3-5 business days. If you have any further questions or concerns, please don't hesitate to contact us.

After reviewing your order, we found that the price of the X500 Wireless Headphones did indeed increase to $129.99 on February 12th, two days after your purchase. However, since you were charged the higher price, we will honor the original price of $119.99 as stated on our website at the time of your purchase on February 10th and reflected in your email confirmation. We will process a refund of $10.00 to your PayPal account within the next 3-5 business days. If you have any further questions or concerns, please don't hesitate to contact us. Thank you for your patience and understanding.

subject: Dispute of Charge for Order #NV23456
body: I am writing to express my frustration with a charge on my recent order. On February 10th, I placed an order for a SmartCam 5000, order number NV23456, which totalled $249.99. However, when I received my bank statement yesterday, I noticed I was charged an additional $50. I did not authorize this charge and I would like it to be reversed immediately. The order confirmation email I received did mention a 'processing fee' but it was not clear what this fee was for and it was not included in the initial total. I have tried to contact the customer service number but it keeps giving me an error message 'CS001 - unavailable due to maintenance'. I would appreciate it if you could look into this matter as soon as possible.

We apologize for the confusion caused by the 'processing fee' and the inconvenience it has caused.
